data.title: Federal Judge Clears Trump Plan Requiring Undocumented Immigrants To Register Or Face Penalties
Over 6,000 Immigrants Declared Dead By Social Security In Effort To Revoke Benefits And Force 'Self-Deportation'
data.description: The Trump administration has reclassified over 6,000 immigrants as deceased, stripping them of work eligibility and pushing them to leave the country. This has sparked legal challenges and criticism of overreach by the administration. Many of those targeted had legal status under Biden-era programs.

data.title: Bernie Sanders Warns: 'The Job You Have Today Ain't Going To Be Here In 10 Or 15 Years,' As AI And Robotics Threaten US Workforce
data.description: Sanders warns about AI and robotics transforming job market and urges people to take the threat seriously.

data.title: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati Targets Record-Breaking $2 Billion Seed Round For New AI Startup
data.description: Mira Murati is reportedly seeking a record-breaking $2 billion seed round for her new AI startup, Thinking Machines.

data.title: Europe, China Eye EV Price Pact To Avert Trump Tariff Escalation After Tesla CEO Elon Musk Pushes For Zero EU Tariffs Amid Declining Sales
data.description: The European Union and China have agreed to explore setting minimum prices for Chinese-made electric vehicles.
